a.xlink:title: Sub-view starting from element abegin and containing asize elements.
Allows reading a vtk file containing an UNSTRUCTURED_GRID.
Refines the mesh once with the patterns present in the pattern_manager.
Method allowing retrieval of owners and flags of cells around patch_cells.
Method allowing cell refinement using the "II_Refine" flag.
Adds entities with local IDs items_local_id.
Method for removing zeros at the beginning and end of the signatures.
Method allowing coarsening of level 0 cells.
Allows starting the reading of a vtk file.
Allocates the mesh entities managed by this service.
Reads a mesh from a file.
Method to obtain the vtk files for the different patterns available in 2D.
Method to obtain the vtk files for the different patterns available in 3D.
Method to generate patterns on a single base element.
Method allowing removal of cells marked with the "II_Coarsen" flag.
Removes and adds the entities removed_local_id and added_local_id from the group.
Method for calculating the signatures of a patch. This method must be called after construction.
